title: Flight Tright
description: Flight Tright is a Minecraft mod that adds the Flatterbird, a flying mob that drops Shards and Feathers used to craft Flatterbird Wings. While the wings don’t function like Elytras, they are a key ingredient in crafting them, adding a new progression path.
body:
**Flight Tright** adds a new progression system for obtaining Elytras through the introduction of the **Flatterbird**, a rare flying mob that spawns in scenic biomes like **Cherry Grove** and **Jungle**. When defeated, Flatterbirds drop **Flatterbird Shards** and **Flatterbird Feathers**, which are used to craft **Flatterbird Wings**—a special item required to craft Elytras, offering a fresh, mid-game path to flight without needing to reach the End.

The mod also introduces a variety of feather-themed decorative blocks, including **stairs**, **slabs**, **trapdoors**, and the softly glowing **Flatterbird Feather Lamp**. A mysterious block called the **Feather Treasure** can transform Flatterbird items into something even more powerful, adding magic and mystery to progression.

**Flight Tright** supports multiple languages, including **English**, **German**, **Spanish**, **French**, **Italian**, **Japanese**, and **Russian**, making it accessible for players around the world.
